=============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(cors, {\\\\\\\\n  origin: isDev ? true : (config.corsOrigin ? config.jwtSecret\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.decorate('authenticate', async (request: any, reply: any) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    await request.jwtVerify();\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    reply.send(err);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Error Handling\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.get('/health', async (): Promise&lt;HealthCheckResponse&gt; =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  let redisHealthy = false;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const redis = getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    const pong = await redis.ping();\\\\\\\\n    redisHealthy = pong === 'PONG';\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    redisHealthy = false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const isHealthy = dbHealthy &amp;&amp; redisHealthy;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    status: isHealthy ? 'healthy' : 'unhealthy',\\\\\\\\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\\\\\\\\n    version: '1.0.0',\\\\\\\\n    services: {\\\\\\\\n      database: dbHealthy,\\\\\\\\n      redis: =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  fastify.log.info(&#96;Received ${signal}, shutting down gracefully...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close HTTP server\\\\\\\\n    await fastify.close();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('HTTP server closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close queues\\\\\\\\n    await closeQueues();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('BullMQ queues closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close Redis\\\\\\\\n    await closeRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Redis connection closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close database pool\\\\\\\\n    await closePool();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Database pool closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.error({ err: error }, 'Error during shutdown');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGTERM'));\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGINT', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGINT'));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Start Server\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst start = async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize database connection\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to database...');\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n      if (!dbHealthy) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new Error('Database ,\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_02d5b0a0-f994-4f6b-b404-27520536f63\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_02d5b0a0-f994-4f6b-b404-27520536f63\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"src/api/middleware/auth.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"src/api/middleware/auth.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"src/api/middleware/auth.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"import { FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\nimport { validateApiKey } from './apiKey.js';\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\nexport async function authenticateOrApiKey(\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  request: FastifyRequest,\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  reply: FastifyReply\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  let jwtError = null;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  // 1. Try JWT\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  if (request.headers.authorization) {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      await request.jwtVerify();\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      jwtError = err;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  // 2. Try API Key\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    await validateApiKey(request, reply);\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  } catch (apiKeyError: any) {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    // If both failed, throw error\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    // If JWT was attempted and failed, maybe return that error?\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    // Or return a generic 401.\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    reply.code(401).send({\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      statusCode: 401,\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      error: 'Unauthorized',\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      message: 'Authentication required (JWT or API Key)',\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      // Only include details in dev/debug if needed, but for now helpful\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      details: {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n        jwt: jwtError?.message,\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n        apiKey: apiKeyError.message\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    return; // Stop execution\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":41}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"aa3799b1-f7b1-4bdd-a5be-5a437da40bae\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"911c48c0-8f55-43fd-8c67-2408e38224b5\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T10:28:48.160Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_ab9079be-1786-4736-a5ad-ed586b0c957\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_ab9079be-1786-4736-a5ad-ed586b0c957\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"migrations/1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"migrations/1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"migrations/1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - Chat System Migration\\\\\\\\n-- Adds conversations, messages, email_accounts, linkedin_connections tables\\\\\\\\n-- with GIN indexes for JSONB fields, sender_id, email_thread_id, status tracking\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Up Migration\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- CONVERSATIONS\\\\\\\\n-- Zentrale Tabelle für Chat-Konversationen (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE conversations (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    lead_id             UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    deal_id             UUID REFERENCES deals(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    type                VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    participant_emails  JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    last_message_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_by_id       UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- Mindestens lead_id ODER deal_id muss gesetzt sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_entity CHECK (lead_id IS NOT NULL OR deal_id IS NOT NULL),\\\\\\\\n    -- type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_type CHECK (type IN ('direct', 'group', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_status CHECK (status IN ('active', 'archived', 'closed'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- MESSAGES\\\\\\\\n-- Speichert alle Nachrichten (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen, Aufgaben)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE messages (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    conversation_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    sender_id           UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    message_type        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email',\\\\\\\\n    direction           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'outbound',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',\\\\\\\\n    sender_email        VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    sender_name         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    recipients          JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    body_html           TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    body_text           TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    metadata            JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    attachments         JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    external_id         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    email_thread_id     VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    sent_at             TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    read_at             TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    replied_at          TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    error_message       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- message_type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_type CHECK (message_type IN ('email', 'linkedin', 'internal_note', 'task')),\\\\\\\\n    -- direction muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_direction CHECK (direction IN ('inbound', 'outbound', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_status CHECK (status IN ('draft', 'sending', 'sent', 'error'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- EMAIL ACCOUNTS\\\\\\\\n-- IMAP/SMTP-Konfiguration für E-Mail-Import und -Versand\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE email_accounts (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    team_member_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    email_address       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    imap_host           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    imap_port           INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    imap_username       VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    imap_password       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    smtp_host           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    smtp_port           INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    smtp_username       VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    smtp_password       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    sync_enabled        BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n    last_sync_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    sync_status         VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'idle',\\\\\\\\n    sync_error          TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- sync_status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_email_accounts_sync_status CHECK (sync_status IN ('idle', 'syncing', 'error'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- LINKEDIN CONNECTIONS\\\\\\\\n-- LinkedIn OAuth-Token und Verbindungsstatus\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE linkedin_connections (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    team_member_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    linkedin_profile_id VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    access_token        TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    refresh_token       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    token_expires_at    TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    profile_data        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    is_active           BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\\\\\\\\n    last_sync_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- B-TREE INDEXES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Conversations indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_lead ON conversations(lead_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_deal ON conversations(deal_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_last_message ON conversations(last_message_at DESC);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_status ON conversations(status);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_created_by ON conversations(created_by_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Messages indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_conversation_sent ON messages(conversation_id, sent_at DESC);\\\\\\\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_messages_external_id ON messages(external_id) WHERE external_id IS NOT NULL;\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_email_thread ON messages(email_thread_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_type ON messages(message_type);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_sender ON messages(sender_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_status ON messages(status) WHERE status IN ('sending', 'error');\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_direction ON messages(direction);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Email accounts indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_accounts_team_member ON email_accounts(team_member_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_accounts_sync ON email_accounts(sync_enabled, sync_status);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- LinkedIn connections indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_team_member ON linkedin_connections(team_member_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_profile ON linkedin_connections(linkedin_profile_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- GIN INDEXES für JSONB-Felder\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf participant_emails (für Teilnehmersuche in Conversations)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_participants ON conversations USING GIN (participant_emails);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf recipients (für Empfängersuche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_recipients ON messages USING GIN (recipients);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf metadata (für Platform-Daten-Suche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_metadata ON messages USING GIN (metadata);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf attachments (für Anhänge-Suche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_attachments ON messages USING GIN (attachments);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf profile_data (für LinkedIn-Profilsuche)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_profile_data ON linkedin_connections USING GIN (profile_data);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- TRIGGERS (updated_at) - nutzt die bestehende update_updated_at() Funktion\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_conversations_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON conversations\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_messages_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON messages\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_email_accounts_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON email_accounts\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_linkedin_connections_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON linkedin_connections\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- Down Migration (auskommentiert, manuell ausführen bei Bedarf)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_linkedin_connections_updated_at ON linkedin_connections;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_email_accounts_updated_at ON email_accounts;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_messages_updated_at ON messages;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_conversations_updated_at ON conversations;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS linkedin_connections CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS email_accounts CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS messages CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS conversations }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Cituro Integration\\\\\\\\n  cituro: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // SMTP Configuration\\\\\\\\n  smtp: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    host: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    port: z.coerce.number().default(587),\\\\\\\\n    user: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    pass: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    secure: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    from: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    fromName: z.string().default('DNA ME'),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Feature Flags\\\\\\\\n  features: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    mocoSync: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    slackAlerts: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    scoreDecay: z.boolean().default(true)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseApiKeys(envValue: string | undefined): Array&lt;{ key: string; source: string }&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (!envValue) return [];\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return envValue.split(',').map(pair =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const [key, source] = pair.split(':');\\\\\\\\n    return { key: key.trim(), source: source?.trim() || 'unknown' };\\\\\\\\n  }).filter(item =&gt; item.key);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Parse Boolean\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, defaultValue: boolean): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  if (value === undefined) return defaultValue;\\\\\\\\n  return value.toLowerCase() === 'true';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// process.env.DATABASE_URL,\\\\\\\\n    redisUrl: process.env.REDIS_URL,\\\\\\\\n    jwtSecret: process.env.JWT_SECRET,\\\\\\\\n    webhookSecret: process.env.WEBHOOK_SECRET,\\\\\\\\n    corsOrigin: },\\\\\\\\n    smtp: {\\\\\\\\n      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      port: process.env.SMTP_PORT,\\\\\\\\n      user: process.env.SMTP_USER || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      pass: process.env.RATE_LIMIT_TIME_WINDOW\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const result = configSchema.safeParse(rawConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!result.success) {\\\\\\\\n =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport pg from 'pg';\\\\\\\\nimport { config } from '../config/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { DatabaseError } from '../errors/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst { Pool } = pg;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Pool Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst poolConfig: pg.PoolConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  connectionString: config.databaseUrl,\\\\\\\\n  max: 20,                    // Maximum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  min: 2,                     // Minimum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,   // Close idle connections after 30s\\\\\\\\n  connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000, // Connection timeout\\\\\\\\n  allowExitOnIdle: false\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet pool: pg.Pool | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getPool(): pg.Pool {\\\\\\\\n  if (!pool) {\\\\\\\\n    pool = new Pool(poolConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('connect', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('✅ PostgreSQL client connected');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('❌ PostgreSQL pool error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('remove', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('PostgreSQL client removed from pool');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return pool;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Database Helper Class\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport class Database {\\\\\\\\n  private pool: pg.Pool;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  constructor() {\\\\\\\\n    this.pool = getPool();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return all rows\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async query&lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    text: string,\\\\\\\\n    params?: unknown[]\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T[]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const result = await this.pool.query(text, params);\\\\\\\\n      return result.rows as T[];\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;Query failed: ${(error as Error).message}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        error as Error\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return the first row or null\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async queryOne&lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    text: string,\\\\\\\\n    params?: unknown[]\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T | null&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const rows = await this.query&lt;T&gt;(text, params);\\\\\\\\n    return rows[0] ?? null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return the first row, throw if not found\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async queryOneOrFail&lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    text: string,\\\\\\\\n    params?: unknown[],\\\\\\\\n    errorMessage: string = 'Record not found'\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const row = await this.queryOne&lt;T&gt;(text, params);\\\\\\\\n    if (!row) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(errorMessage);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return row;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return the count of affected rows\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async execute(text: string, params?: unknown[]): Promise&lt;number&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const result = await this.pool.query(text, params);\\\\\\\\n      return result.rowCount ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;Execute failed: ${(error as Error).message}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        error as Error\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Run a transaction with automatic rollback on error\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async transaction&lt;T&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    callback: (client: pg.PoolClient) =&gt; Promise&lt;T&gt;\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const client = await this.pool.connect();\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('BEGIN');\\\\\\\\n      const result = await callback(client);\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('COMMIT');\\\\\\\\n      return result;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('ROLLBACK');\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;Transaction failed: ${(error as Error).message}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        error as Error\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      client.release();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Check database connectivity\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async healthCheck(): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const result = await this.queryOne&lt;{ now: Date }&gt;('SELECT NOW() as now');\\\\\\\\n      return result !== null;\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      return false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Get pool statistics\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  getStats() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      totalCount: this.pool.totalCount,\\\\\\\\n      idleCount: this.pool.idleCount,\\\\\\\\n      waitingCount: this.pool.waitingCount\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Singleton Database Instance\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet dbInstance: Database | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getDatabase(): Database {\\\\\\\\n  if (!dbInstance) {\\\\\\\\n    dbInstance = new Database();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return dbInstance;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Convenience export\\\\\\\\nexport const db = {\\\\\\\\n  get instance() {\\\\\\\\n    return getDatabase();\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  query: &lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(text: string, params?: unknown[]) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().query&lt;T&gt;(text, params),\\\\\\\\n  queryOne: &lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(text: string, params?: unknown[]) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().queryOne&lt;T&gt;(text, params),\\\\\\\\n  queryOneOrFail: &lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(text: string, params?: unknown[], errorMessage?: string) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().queryOneOrFail&lt;T&gt;(text, params, errorMessage),\\\\\\\\n  execute: (text: string, params?: unknown[]) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().execute(text, params),\\\\\\\\n  transaction: &lt;T&gt;(callback: (client: pg.PoolClient) =&gt; Promise&lt;T&gt;) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().transaction&lt;T&gt;(callback),\\\\\\\\n  healthCheck: () =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().healthCheck(),\\\\\\\\n  getStats: () =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().getStats()\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Close Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function closePool(): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (pool) {\\\\\\\\n    await pool.end();\\\\\\\\n    pool = null;\\\\\\\\n    dbInstance = null;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('PostgreSQL pool closed gracefully');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default db;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":217}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"709085d7-2ce4-45bd-8e8b-f7efcab1b6f2\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"3a42dc79-b8c2-4817-8450-c9c369f4eea9\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T10:28:48.167Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"
